title: Trump says U.S. to hold off for 10 days on hitting Iran energy sites
summary_full: Trump’s statement follows an Iranian report that it had rejected a 15-point U.S. ceasefire proposal, a move that still left the door open for a counteroffer.
summary_public: Trump’s statement follows an Iranian report that it had rejected a 15-point U.S. ceasefire proposal, a move that still left the door open for a counteroffer.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: U.S. to hold off for 10 days on hitting Iran energy sites
